expected_behavior: Loads maximo-pm-planning and maximo-overview as parent
Surfaces clarifying questions BEFORE answering — at minimum the forecast horizon (next 30/60/90 days or a quarter) and the on-time tolerance convention (SMRP 10%, fixed days, or customer-specific)
Checks whether CALENDAR / WORKPERIOD capacity tables are populated before claiming a capacity gap; if sparse, says the over-scheduled math is unreliable rather than reporting a false gap
Does NOT silently pick a horizon and return a single over/under verdict
For the workload-vs-capacity comparison, composes maximo-labor-resources for crew capacity (does not re-derive the capacity master here)
Sums forecast workload via v_pm_workload_by_craft / pm_workload_hours, expanding PMSEQUENCE and using COALESCE(EXTDATE, NEXTDATE)
